creator: jsellens@generalconcepts.com
text:
biffer is a better biff - forwards multiple machines/users, etc.

Fix: Here's the shar of the port directory.

	I should note that biffer needs entries in /etc/services
	and /etc/inetd.conf to work.  I didn't know of an automated
	or standard way of doing that, so I created scripts/post-install
	as a simple-minded way of trying to deal with some of it
	without breaking too much - please have a look, and I'd
	welcome any suggestions as to how to better deal with it,
	or examples of other ports with the same problem.

	Thanks!
